snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryŌĆÖs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonŌĆÖt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.description:
╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR, Žä╬┐ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬╗ŽģŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žć╬Į╬»╬┤╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬Į╬ĄŽē╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆ╬╗╬┐ŽģŽä╬╣Žā╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ŽāŽģ╬Į╬▒ŽüŽĆ╬▒ŽāŽä╬╣╬║Žī ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬╝╬Ą ŽĆ╬▒╬»╬║Žä╬ĄŽé ╬ŁŽä╬┐╬╣╬╝╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Į╬▒ Žü╬╣ŽćŽä╬┐ŽŹ╬Į ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ŽāŽä╬»╬▓╬┐ ╬╝╬¼Žć╬ĘŽé. ╬×╬Ą╬║╬»╬Į╬ĘŽā╬▒╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ö╬╣╬¼Žā╬Ę╬╝╬┐╬╣ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬£╬▒Žć╬ĘŽä╬ŁŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽĆ╬╗╬Ł╬┐╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ÜŽī╬║╬║╬╣╬Į╬Ę ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽēŽé ╬£ŽĆ╬╗╬Ą ╬┐╬╝╬¼╬┤╬▒ ╬┤╬»╬Į╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬┐╬Į ╬║╬▒╬╗ŽŹŽä╬ĄŽüŽī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī ╬ŁŽć╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé ŽēŽé ╬╝╬┐╬Į╬▒╬┤╬╣╬║Žī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ŽāŽäŽīŽć╬┐ Žä╬Ę ╬Į╬»╬║╬Ę. ╬ŻŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐, ŽĆ╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬╣Žé ŽāŽģ╬Į╬Ė╬«╬║╬ĄŽé ╬┤╬╣╬▒╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé, ŽĆŽü╬ŁŽĆ╬Ą╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽäŽēŽĆ╬»Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žä╬ĘŽä╬╣╬║╬ŁŽé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬ĄŽé, Žä╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽüŽī╬┐ŽĆŽä╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žä╬▒ ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆŽī╬┤╬╣╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬╝╬ĄŽäŽü╬Ę╬Ė╬┐ŽŹ╬Į, ŽīŽć╬╣ ╬╝Žī╬Į╬┐ ╬╝╬ĄŽä╬▒╬ŠŽŹ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé, ╬▒╬╗╬╗╬¼ ŽĆ╬¼╬ĮŽē ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žī╬╗╬▒ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐╬Į ╬»╬┤╬╣╬┐ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬┐╬Į ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī. ╬æ╬│ŽÄ╬Į╬ĄŽé ╬ĄŽĆ╬¼╬Ė╬╗╬┐Žģ, ╬▒ŽāŽģ╬╗╬»╬▒Žé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬║╬┐╬╣╬ĮŽē╬Į╬»╬▒Žé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬¼╬Č╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬┐Žć╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé. ╬ŻŽä╬┐ ╬ŻŽģ╬╝╬▓╬┐ŽŹ╬╗╬╣╬┐ ╬│╬»╬Į╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒╬╣ ╬┐╬╣ ŽĆ╬╣╬┐ ╬║Žü╬»Žā╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽé Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬ĄŽé Žī╬╝ŽēŽé ╬Ę Žä╬Ą╬╗╬╣╬║╬« ╬▒ŽĆŽīŽå╬▒Žā╬Ę ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬┐ ŽĆ╬┐╬╣╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬▒╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬Ą╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐ ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ Žä╬┐Žģ Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬┐ŽĆŽä╬╣╬║╬┐ŽŹ ╬║╬┐╬╣╬Į╬┐ŽŹ. ╬¤ ╬Ł╬╝ŽĆ╬Ą╬╣Žü╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬┐ŽģŽā╬╣╬▒ŽāŽä╬«Žé ╬ō╬╣ŽÄŽü╬│╬┐Žé ╬ø╬╣╬▒╬ĮŽīŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ╬Ą╬║╬Ą╬»╬Į╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬▓Žü╬»Žā╬║╬ĄŽä╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬╗╬ĄŽģŽüŽī ŽäŽē╬Į ŽĆ╬▒╬╣╬║ŽäŽÄ╬Į Žā╬Ą ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬▒ ╬▓╬¼╬Č╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬║╬╗╬»╬╝╬▒. ╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR╬┤╬»╬Į╬Ą╬╣ Žü╬▒╬ĮŽä╬Ą╬▓╬┐ŽŹ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬ÜŽģŽü╬╣╬▒╬║╬« ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 21.00 ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬ö╬ĄŽģŽä╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬ŁŽēŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ż╬ĄŽä╬¼ŽüŽä╬Ę ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 22.00.

snippet.title: Toyota GR Yaris v Mitsubishi Evo VI - DRAG RACE *Tommi Makinen Showdown*
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowŌĆÖs this for an old school vs new school drag race! 

WeŌĆÖve got Mat in his all-new Toyota GR Yaris, and heŌĆÖs going up against Yianni in the Mitsubishi Evo VI Tommi Makinen Edition! And even if thereŌĆÖs 20 years between these two competitors, theyŌĆÖre actually more closely matched than you may thinkŌĆ”

First up we have the GR Yaris. Powered by a 1.6-litre 3-cylinder turbo petrol, it can produce 261hp and 360Nm, while it also comes with a 6-speed manual gearbox. As for the Evo VI? Well it has 2-litre 4-cylinder turbo petrol, which can produce 276hp and 373Nm! And of course, no surprise to hear that itŌĆÖs a manual as well. 

So they're pretty similar, right? WhatŌĆÖs more, theyŌĆÖre both closely connected to legendary rally driver Tommi Makinen! While the Evo VI we have here is the Tommi Makinen edition (due to him previously winning the WRC in an Evo VI), he was also Team Principal for the Toyota Gazoo Racing, a rally team currently leading the WRC!

So what do you think - an easy win for the GR Yaris? Or will the classic Evo take it? 

ThereŌĆÖs only one way to find outŌĆ” LETŌĆÖS RACE!

.............................................................

╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR, Žä╬┐ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬╗ŽģŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žć╬Į╬»╬┤╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬Į╬ĄŽē╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆ╬╗╬┐ŽģŽä╬╣Žā╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ŽāŽģ╬Į╬▒ŽüŽĆ╬▒ŽāŽä╬╣╬║Žī ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬╝╬Ą ŽĆ╬▒╬»╬║Žä╬ĄŽé ╬ŁŽä╬┐╬╣╬╝╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Į╬▒ Žü╬╣ŽćŽä╬┐ŽŹ╬Į ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ŽāŽä╬»╬▓╬┐ ╬╝╬¼Žć╬ĘŽé. ╬×╬Ą╬║╬»╬Į╬ĘŽā╬▒╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ö╬╣╬¼Žā╬Ę╬╝╬┐╬╣ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬£╬▒Žć╬ĘŽä╬ŁŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽĆ╬╗╬Ł╬┐╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ÜŽī╬║╬║╬╣╬Į╬Ę ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽēŽé ╬£ŽĆ╬╗╬Ą ╬┐╬╝╬¼╬┤╬▒ ╬┤╬»╬Į╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬┐╬Į ╬║╬▒╬╗ŽŹŽä╬ĄŽüŽī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī ╬ŁŽć╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé ŽēŽé ╬╝╬┐╬Į╬▒╬┤╬╣╬║Žī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ŽāŽäŽīŽć╬┐ Žä╬Ę ╬Į╬»╬║╬Ę. ╬ŻŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐, ŽĆ╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬╣Žé ŽāŽģ╬Į╬Ė╬«╬║╬ĄŽé ╬┤╬╣╬▒╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé, ŽĆŽü╬ŁŽĆ╬Ą╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽäŽēŽĆ╬»Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žä╬ĘŽä╬╣╬║╬ŁŽé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬ĄŽé, Žä╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽüŽī╬┐ŽĆŽä╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žä╬▒ ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆŽī╬┤╬╣╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬╝╬ĄŽäŽü╬Ę╬Ė╬┐ŽŹ╬Į, ŽīŽć╬╣ ╬╝Žī╬Į╬┐ ╬╝╬ĄŽä╬▒╬ŠŽŹ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé, ╬▒╬╗╬╗╬¼ ŽĆ╬¼╬ĮŽē ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žī╬╗╬▒ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐╬Į ╬»╬┤╬╣╬┐ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬┐╬Į ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī. ╬æ╬│ŽÄ╬Į╬ĄŽé ╬ĄŽĆ╬¼╬Ė╬╗╬┐Žģ, ╬▒ŽāŽģ╬╗╬»╬▒Žé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬║╬┐╬╣╬ĮŽē╬Į╬»╬▒Žé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬¼╬Č╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬┐Žć╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé. ╬ŻŽä╬┐ ╬ŻŽģ╬╝╬▓╬┐ŽŹ╬╗╬╣╬┐ ╬│╬»╬Į╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒╬╣ ╬┐╬╣ ŽĆ╬╣╬┐ ╬║Žü╬»Žā╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽé Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬ĄŽé Žī╬╝ŽēŽé ╬Ę Žä╬Ą╬╗╬╣╬║╬« ╬▒ŽĆŽīŽå╬▒Žā╬Ę ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬┐ ŽĆ╬┐╬╣╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬▒╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬Ą╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐ ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ Žä╬┐Žģ Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬┐ŽĆŽä╬╣╬║╬┐ŽŹ ╬║╬┐╬╣╬Į╬┐ŽŹ. ╬¤ ╬Ł╬╝ŽĆ╬Ą╬╣Žü╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬┐ŽģŽā╬╣╬▒ŽāŽä╬«Žé ╬ō╬╣ŽÄŽü╬│╬┐Žé ╬ø╬╣╬▒╬ĮŽīŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ╬Ą╬║╬Ą╬»╬Į╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬▓Žü╬»Žā╬║╬ĄŽä╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬╗╬ĄŽģŽüŽī ŽäŽē╬Į ŽĆ╬▒╬╣╬║ŽäŽÄ╬Į Žā╬Ą ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬▒ ╬▓╬¼╬Č╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬║╬╗╬»╬╝╬▒. ╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR╬┤╬»╬Į╬Ą╬╣ Žü╬▒╬ĮŽä╬Ą╬▓╬┐ŽŹ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬ÜŽģŽü╬╣╬▒╬║╬« ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 21.00 ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬ö╬ĄŽģŽä╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬ŁŽēŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ż╬ĄŽä╬¼ŽüŽä╬Ę ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 22.00.

╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR, Žä╬┐ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬╗ŽģŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žć╬Į╬»╬┤╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬Į╬ĄŽē╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆ╬╗╬┐ŽģŽä╬╣Žā╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐, ŽāŽģ╬Į╬▒ŽüŽĆ╬▒ŽāŽä╬╣╬║Žī ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬╝╬Ą ŽĆ╬▒╬»╬║Žä╬ĄŽé ╬ŁŽä╬┐╬╣╬╝╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Į╬▒ Žü╬╣ŽćŽä╬┐ŽŹ╬Į ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ŽāŽä╬»╬▓╬┐ ╬╝╬¼Žć╬ĘŽé. ╬×╬Ą╬║╬»╬Į╬ĘŽā╬▒╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ö╬╣╬¼Žā╬Ę╬╝╬┐╬╣ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬£╬▒Žć╬ĘŽä╬ŁŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽĆ╬╗╬Ł╬┐╬Į ŽēŽé ╬ÜŽī╬║╬║╬╣╬Į╬Ę ╬║╬▒╬╣ ŽēŽé ╬£ŽĆ╬╗╬Ą ╬┐╬╝╬¼╬┤╬▒ ╬┤╬»╬Į╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬┐╬Į ╬║╬▒╬╗ŽŹŽä╬ĄŽüŽī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī ╬ŁŽć╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé ŽēŽé ╬╝╬┐╬Į╬▒╬┤╬╣╬║Žī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ŽāŽäŽīŽć╬┐ Žä╬Ę ╬Į╬»╬║╬Ę. ╬ŻŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐, ŽĆ╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žä╬╣Žé ŽāŽģ╬Į╬Ė╬«╬║╬ĄŽé ╬┤╬╣╬▒╬▓╬»ŽēŽā╬ĘŽé, ŽĆŽü╬ŁŽĆ╬Ą╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽäŽēŽĆ╬»Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒ŽĆ╬▒╬╣Žä╬ĘŽä╬╣╬║╬ŁŽé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬ĄŽé, Žä╬▒ ╬▒ŽĆŽüŽī╬┐ŽĆŽä╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žä╬▒ ╬Ą╬╝ŽĆŽī╬┤╬╣╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬Į╬▒ ╬▒╬Į╬▒╬╝╬ĄŽäŽü╬Ę╬Ė╬┐ŽŹ╬Į, ŽīŽć╬╣ ╬╝Žī╬Į╬┐ ╬╝╬ĄŽä╬▒╬ŠŽŹ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé, ╬▒╬╗╬╗╬¼ ŽĆ╬¼╬ĮŽē ╬▒ŽĆŽī Žī╬╗╬▒ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐╬Į ╬»╬┤╬╣╬┐ Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬┐╬Į ╬Ą╬▒ŽģŽäŽī. ╬æ╬│ŽÄ╬Į╬ĄŽé ╬ĄŽĆ╬¼╬Ė╬╗╬┐Žģ, ╬▒ŽāŽģ╬╗╬»╬▒Žé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ĄŽĆ╬╣╬║╬┐╬╣╬ĮŽē╬Į╬»╬▒Žé ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬¼╬Č╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒╬ĮŽä╬┐Žć╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé. ╬ŻŽä╬┐ ╬ŻŽģ╬╝╬▓╬┐ŽŹ╬╗╬╣╬┐ ╬│╬»╬Į╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒╬╣ ╬┐╬╣ ŽĆ╬╣╬┐ ╬║Žü╬»Žā╬╣╬╝╬ĄŽé Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬ĄŽé Žī╬╝ŽēŽé ╬Ę Žä╬Ą╬╗╬╣╬║╬« ╬▒ŽĆŽīŽå╬▒Žā╬Ę ╬│╬╣╬▒ Žä╬┐ ŽĆ╬┐╬╣╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬▒╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬Ą╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐╬Į ╬å╬│╬╣╬┐ ╬ö╬┐╬╝╬»╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐ ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ Žä╬┐Žģ Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬┐ŽĆŽä╬╣╬║╬┐ŽŹ ╬║╬┐╬╣╬Į╬┐ŽŹ. ╬¤ ╬Ł╬╝ŽĆ╬Ą╬╣Žü╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬┐ŽģŽā╬╣╬▒ŽāŽä╬«Žé ╬ō╬╣ŽÄŽü╬│╬┐Žé ╬ø╬╣╬▒╬ĮŽīŽé ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ╬Ą╬║╬Ą╬»╬Į╬┐Žé ŽĆ╬┐Žģ ╬▓Žü╬»Žā╬║╬ĄŽä╬▒╬╣ ŽāŽä╬┐ ŽĆ╬╗╬ĄŽģŽüŽī ŽäŽē╬Į ŽĆ╬▒╬╣╬║ŽäŽÄ╬Į Žā╬Ą ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬▒Žā╬»╬▒ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žł╬ĘŽå╬┐Žå╬┐Žü╬»╬▒ ╬▓╬¼╬Č╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬║╬╗╬»╬╝╬▒. ╬ż╬┐ SURVIVOR╬┤╬»╬Į╬Ą╬╣ Žü╬▒╬ĮŽä╬Ą╬▓╬┐ŽŹ ╬╝╬Ą Žä╬┐ŽģŽé Žä╬Ę╬╗╬Ą╬Ė╬Ą╬▒Žä╬ŁŽé Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Ż╬Ü╬æ╬¬ ╬║╬¼╬Ė╬Ą ╬ÜŽģŽü╬╣╬▒╬║╬« ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 21.00 ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬▒ŽĆŽī╬ö╬ĄŽģŽä╬ŁŽü╬▒ ╬ŁŽēŽé ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ż╬ĄŽä╬¼ŽüŽä╬Ę ŽāŽä╬╣Žé 22.00.

snippet.description:
Angel leaves Harak Singh and the rest of his family helpless as she drags Heer out to take her along. However, the situation changes for Angel when she gets slapped by Virat as she comes out of the house. How will Angel retaliate to this insult?

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

╬Ś ╬£╬▒Žü╬»╬▒ ╬ø╬▒╬Č╬▒Žü╬»╬┤╬┐Žģ, ╬ŁŽć╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé ╬║╬ĄŽü╬┤╬»Žā╬Ą╬╣ Žä╬Ę╬Į ╬Ü╬¼ŽüŽä╬▒ ╬æŽāŽģ╬╗╬»╬▒Žé ╬▒╬╗╬╗╬¼ ╬║╬▒╬╣ Žä╬▒ ŽĆ╬╗╬Ą╬┐╬Į╬Ą╬║Žä╬«╬╝╬▒Žä╬▒, ╬╝╬ĄŽä╬¼ Žä╬Ę ╬Į╬»╬║╬Ę Žä╬ĘŽé ŽāŽä╬┐ ╬ż╬ĄŽāŽä ╬ö╬Ę╬╝╬╣╬┐ŽģŽü╬│╬╣╬║ŽīŽä╬ĘŽä╬▒Žé, ╬Ė╬▒ ╬┐Žü╬»Žā╬Ą╬╣ Žä╬╣Žé ╬▒╬╗╬╗╬▒╬│╬ŁŽé ŽāŽä╬╣Žé ╬┤ŽŹ╬┐ ╬┐╬╝╬¼╬┤╬ĄŽé. 
 
╬Ü╬▒╬╗╬ĄŽā╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐╬╣ ŽäŽē╬Į chef ╬║Žü╬╣ŽäŽÄ╬Į, ╬ŻŽēŽä╬«Žü╬Ę ╬Ü╬┐╬ĮŽä╬╣╬Č╬¼, ╬Ā╬¼╬Į╬┐Žģ ╬ÖŽē╬▒╬Į╬Į╬»╬┤╬Ę ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬ø╬ĄŽē╬Į╬»╬┤╬▒ ╬Ü╬┐ŽģŽäŽāŽīŽĆ╬┐Žģ╬╗╬┐Žģ, ╬│╬╣╬▒ ╬Į╬▒ ╬┤╬┐╬║╬╣╬╝╬¼Žā╬┐Žģ╬Į Žä╬╣Žé ŽĆŽü╬┐ŽāŽĆ╬¼╬Ė╬Ą╬╣╬ĄŽé ŽäŽē╬Į ╬┤ŽŹ╬┐ ╬┐╬╝╬¼╬┤Žē╬Į, ╬Ą╬»╬Į╬▒╬╣ ╬┐ ╬æŽāŽä╬ŁŽü╬╣╬┐Žé ╬Ü╬┐ŽģŽāŽä╬┐ŽŹ╬┤╬ĘŽé, executive chef  Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Š╬Ą╬Į╬┐╬┤╬┐Žć╬Ą╬»╬┐Žģ Grande Bretagne ╬║╬▒╬╣ ╬┐ ╬ŻŽēŽä╬«Žü╬ĘŽé ╬ĢŽģ╬▒╬│╬│╬Ł╬╗╬┐Žģ, executive chef Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Š╬Ą╬Į╬┐╬┤╬┐Žć╬Ą╬»╬┐Žģ Makedonia Palace. ╬¤╬╣ ╬┤ŽŹ╬┐ ╬┤╬╣╬▒╬║╬Ą╬║Žü╬╣╬╝╬Ł╬Į╬┐╬╣ chef, Žå╬ŁŽü╬Į╬┐Žģ╬Į ŽāŽä╬Ę ╬Ė╬Ą╬╝╬▒Žä╬╣╬║╬« ╬Ą╬▓╬┤╬┐╬╝╬¼╬┤╬▒ Žä╬Ę╬Į ╬┐ŽĆŽä╬╣╬║╬« Žä╬ĘŽé ŽāŽŹ╬│ŽćŽü╬┐╬Į╬ĘŽé ╬ĄŽĆ╬┐Žć╬«Žé, ŽĆ╬▒Žü╬┐ŽģŽā╬╣╬¼╬Č╬┐╬ĮŽä╬▒Žé  Žä╬┐ ╬│╬▒ŽāŽäŽü╬╣╬╝╬▒Žü╬│╬╣╬║Žī Žä╬┐ŽģŽé ╬ŁŽü╬│╬┐ ŽāŽä╬Ę Žā╬║╬╣╬¼ Žä╬┐Žģ ╬¼╬│ŽüŽģŽĆ╬Į╬┐Žģ ŽåŽü╬┐ŽģŽü╬┐ŽŹ Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Ą╬╗╬╗╬Ę╬Į╬╣╬║╬┐ŽŹ ŽĆ╬Į╬ĄŽŹ╬╝╬▒Žä╬┐Žé. ╬ż╬┐╬Į ╬Į╬▒Žī Žä╬┐Žģ ╬Ā╬┐Žā╬Ą╬╣╬┤ŽÄ╬Į╬▒.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 04 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th Mar 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 04 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th Mar 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her familyŌĆÖs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates FarhadŌĆÖs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win MahiŌĆÖs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Ang Sa Iyo Ay Akin | Episode 149 (2/4) | March 11, 2021
snippet.description:
Following Marissa's (Jodi Sta. Maria) revelation, Gabriel (Sam Milby) stands at a crossroads as he struggles to make peace with the truth. Meanwhile, Jake (Grae Fernandez) and Hope (Kira Balinger) grow suspicious of their respective mothers. The war between the Pinedas and the Ce├▒idozas soon intensifies as they exhaust all means to bring one another down.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3120 - Full Episode - 11th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3120: 
-----------------------
Bagha comes into Gokuldham society and sees Bhogilal's car. He thinks that Bhogilal has come to return Jethalal's 50 Lakh rupees. Bhogilal was about to close the land deal when Bagha entered the room. Bhogilal immediately recognized him. Taarak tries to handle the situation but Bhogilal comes to know about Jethalal's Plan. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3119 - Full Episode - 10th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3119: 
-----------------------
With Bhogilal and Champaklal getting the land deal sorted out in the drawing-room, the Gokuldham members are growing restless waiting in the kitchen and the bedroom. In the ensuing chaos, there's a loud noise from the bedroom. Champaklal says that he has kept a dog locked up in the bedroom. Hearing this, Jethalal is forced to bark like a dog so as to avoid any suspicions from Bhogilal. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Ang Sa Iyo Ay Akin | Episode 147 (1/4) | March 9, 2021
snippet.description:
Avel (Joseph Marco) and Gabriel (Sam Milby) race against time to save Jake (Grae Fernandez) and Hope (Kira Balinger) as danger inches closer to the two teens. The Pinedas and the Villarosas soon find themselves clinging on to life. Adding fuel to the fire, Belen (Rita Avila) sows seeds of doubt in Ellice's (Iza Calzado) mind about her family's closeness with Marissa (Jodi Sta. Maria).

snippet.description:

You know what time it isŌĆ” Time for another EPIC carwow drag race! WeŌĆÖve got Mat in a Nissan GT-R NISMO, and heŌĆÖs going up against an Audi R8 V10 Performance & a Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

But how do they compare? First up, MatŌĆÖs GT-R NISMO is powered by a 3.8-litre twin-turbo V6 which can produce 600hp & 650Nm. The R8 alongside him has a 5.2-litre V10 with 625hp & 590Nm of torque. And then finally we have the Porsche, which has a 3.8-litre flat-six turbo to produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

So, there's one thing they have in common - theyŌĆÖre all absolutely awesome machines! But of course, there can only be one winner - so whoŌĆÖs your money on? We know how quick the 911 Turbo is, so it may be a foregone conclusion when it comes to who snatches the win... But could Mat snatch second place from Yianni in the Audi R8?

ThereŌĆÖs only one way to find outŌĆ” LETŌĆÖS RACE!

snippet.title: Emanet 136. B├Čl├╝m Fragman─▒ | Legacy Episode 136 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman K─▒r─▒ml─▒ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherŌĆÖs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewŌĆ” Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleŌĆÖs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: INA NG BINATILYO SA VIRAL VIDEO NA INIHAGIS SA SWIMMING POOL, NAGPA-TULFO!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 15 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her familyŌĆÖs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates FarhadŌĆÖs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win MahiŌĆÖs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
